data.name: Loreley

weaponImprint.name: Tidal Nocturne
weaponImprint.trait: At the end of the action, if Confectance index is not full, gain 1 random buff, lasting for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect:
Burn damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 5%. If the user has [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] or [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], Burn damage dealt is increased by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%/45%.

When a burn buff is applied to an allied unit, gain [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 2 turns.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Burn type debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to ELIDs is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
Beneath her mysterious and elegant exterior lies a deep and audacious desire, like an undercurrent. No one can fathom her thoughts; perhaps, her true heart resides only for one person.

"Hehehe, Commander, are you interested in me after reviewing my information? If you want to know more, you should come find me yourself. I will tell you everything about myself, bit by bit, without reservation..."

skills.name: Punishment Prelude
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Queen’s Gift
skills.description:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds.

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 3 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds.

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 5 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage. For each Burn type doll present, increase attack of self by 6%.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds. Additionally, all friendly units (excluding self) gain 1 additional stack of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 5 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase the number of times [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] can be applied by 5.

[effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] is replaced with [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

[effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5] no longer increases Burn damage. Instead, it increases damage dealt by 45%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
While Loreley is on the field, all friendly units gain 1 additional stack of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2]. For each Burn type doll present, increase attack of self by 6%.

The effects of [effect:20d3df91-9294-4d19-9321-de5f076bd69e] applied by [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is enhanced to increase attack by 12%.

[effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5] gains a new effect: Damage taken is reduced by 30%.

skills.name: Scorching Brand
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If user has [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], double the damage multipler and gain [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If user has [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], double the damage multipler and gain [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns. Ignores 30% of defense. If target is on a burn tile, increase damage dealt by 60%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Ignores 30% of defense. If target is on a burn tile, increase damage dealt by 60%.

skills.name: Crimson Binding Decree
skills.description:
Deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets within 4 tiles. The damage is distributed evenly among all targets.

If user has [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], the damage is not split and and generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Deals AoE Burn damage equal to 150% of attack to all enemy targets within 5 tiles. The damage is distributed evenly among all targets.

If user has [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], the damage is not split and and generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 3 turns. Every Burn buff increases damage dealt by 10%, up to a maximum of 40%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased by 30% and effective range increased by 1 tile.

Every Burn buff increases damage dealt by 10%, up to a maximum of 40%.

skills.name: Agony’s Grace
skills.description:
Selects a tile within 5 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target tile, and generates Incineration tiles and summon [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7]. If [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is already present, resummon it at the target location.

Grants [effect:5ef6ed4b-2601-43a5-945f-f17fa399c433] to self an nearest allied doll, and cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] from all allied units.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects a tile within 5 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target tile, and generates Incineration tiles and summon [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7]. If [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is already present, resummon it at the target location.

Grants [effect:5ef6ed4b-2601-43a5-945f-f17fa399c433] to self an nearest allied doll, and cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects a tile within 5 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target tile, and generates Incineration tiles and summon [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7]. If [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is already present, resummon it at the target location.

Grants [effect:5ef6ed4b-2601-43a5-945f-f17fa399c433] to self an nearest allied doll, and cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units and also apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:5ef6ed4b-2601-43a5-945f-f17fa399c433] gains a new effects: When taking fatal damage, restore HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and 5 points of stability. Cleanses all debuffs and reduce damage taken by 60% for 1 turn.

After using an active skill or basic attack, [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] triggers an additional instance of [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8].

Additionally removes [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] gainst an additional 4 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] on summon.

The damage multiplier of [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8] is doubled, and for each [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8] triggered, Loreley's damage is increased by 10%, up to a maximum of 60% and critical damage is increased by 2%, up to a maximum of 12%.

Applies [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to all friendly units.

keys.effect: When this unit has a Burn buff, critical rate is increased by 10%.
At the start of the battle, gain 1 point of Confectance Index and 10 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].
When [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7]'s passive [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8] deals damage, apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to target for 1 turn.
When [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is on the field, Burn damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 7%.
Before performing an active attack, cleanse 1 buff from the target.
At the start of battle, gain [effect:bba82e44-ad79-4407-a6c6-ba2706cfc074] for 1 turn.
When a normal ELID enemy ends its action within 3 tiles of [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7], it is instantly killed. (This kill does not deal damage.)

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:5ef6ed4b-2601-43a5-945f-f17fa399c433] gains a new effects: When taking fatal damage, restore HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and 5 points of stability. Cleanses all debuffs and reduce damage taken by 60% for 1 turn.

After using an active skill or basic attack, [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] triggers an additional instance of [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8].

Additionally removes [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.

doll.name: Loreley
doll.effects:
Beneath her mysterious and elegant exterior lies a deep and audacious desire, like an undercurrent. No one can fathom her thoughts; perhaps, her true heart resides only for one person.

"Hehehe, Commander, are you interested in me after reviewing my information? If you want to know more, you should come find me yourself. I will tell you everything about myself, bit by bit, without reservation..."

doll.effects:
Beneath her mysterious and elegant exterior lies a deep and audacious desire, like an undercurrent. No one can fathom her thoughts; perhaps, her true heart resides only for one person.

"Hehehe, Commander, are you interested in me after reviewing my information? If you want to know more, you should come find me yourself. I will tell you everything about myself, bit by bit, without reservation..."

skillsLevel3.name: Queen’s Gift
skillsLevel3.description:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds.

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 3 times per turn.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds.

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 5 times per turn.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
All allied dolls wielding a rifle deals 10% increased damage. For each Burn type doll present, increase attack of self by 6%.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. While Loreley is present on the field, the [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79] effects of [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac] is upgraded to [effect:4b9440d5-b932-4dd3-acf1-a30e9a45d5c5], lasting 2 rounds. Additionally, all friendly units (excluding self) gain 1 additional stack of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

At the start of a round, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. At the end of action, if [effect:20602294-94fc-446a-b419-20843958e9f7] is present on the field, gain [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. This effect can only be triggered at most once per round.

Before an allied unit takes damage, apply [effect:e2e83e84-dfb6-4dee-8e4f-5f0881b2c991] to them. This effect can only be triggered a at most 5 times per turn.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Burn damage dealt by this unit, Burn damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Increase Burn damage dealt by 30%. Increase damage dealt by 15%. Reduces damage taken by 15%. Critical damage is permanently increased by 5%. Considered a Burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"972187a7-9c6b-46e7-a156-a6a7a74eab84","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

Increase damage dealt by 45%. Reduces damage taken by 15%. Critical damage is permanently increased by 5%. Considered a Burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"77561a5f-fab6-4d48-b50d-43f36a4259e1","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Increase damage dealt by 45%. Reduces damage taken by 30%. Critical damage is permanently increased by 5%. Considered a Burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}

{"mainDetails":"

On summon, gain 8 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and apply [effect:20d3df91-9294-4d19-9321-de5f076bd69e] to all allied units for 3 rounds.

When Loreley ends her action, she triggers [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8].

All enemy units with a 5-tile radius take 15% increased Burn damage.

","upgrades":[{"id":"cf680d80-f469-4e4d-9e49-1a959505c3ba","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

On summon, gain 8 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and apply [effect:20d3df91-9294-4d19-9321-de5f076bd69e] to all allied units for 3 rounds.

When Loreley uses her basic attack, active skill, or ends her action, she triggers [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8].

All enemy units with a 5-tile radius take 15% increased Burn damage.

","order":0},{"id":"e2b192ae-cd89-4b11-992f-582a7c6e5523","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

On summon, gain 12 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and apply [effect:20d3df91-9294-4d19-9321-de5f076bd69e] to all allied units for 3 rounds.

When Loreley uses her basic attack, active skill, or ends her action, she triggers [effect:87ed26d0-abc6-4da1-a98e-7c555c32a6b8].

All enemy units with a 5-tile radius take 15% increased Burn damage.

","order":1}]}
Immune to basic attacks and skill damage. The immunity is removed after receiving 1 basic attack or skill attack. Considered a burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

Deals AoE Burn damage equal to 40% of Loreley's attack to all enemies within a 5-tile radius. Cleanses 1 debuff from all allied units, restores 2 points of stability, and grants 3 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

","upgrades":[{"id":"33afb3d4-6cc4-40e9-a58e-f396b03800d7","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

Deals AoE Burn damage equal to 80% of Loreley's attack to all enemies within a 5-tile radius. Cleanses 1 debuff from all allied units, restores 2 points of stability, and grants 3 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2]. Each time this is triggered, increase the Loreley's damage by 10%, up to a maximum of 60%, and critical damage by 2%, up to a maximum of 12%.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Attack is increased by 6%. Considered a burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"ec6f4fd4-f804-4d34-a046-80ac50b93658","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Attack is increased by 12%. Considered a burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Prevents the unit from dying when taking fatal damage. If another allied unit with this effect were to take fatal damage, you die immediately. This effect lasts for 1 round. Considered a burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"0e3eb57e-4948-490d-aa2a-d411684bb633","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

Prevents the unit from dying when taking fatal damage. Instead, it restores HP equal to 25% of max HP and 5 points of stability, dispels all debuffs, and reduces damage taken by 60% for 1 turn. If another allied unit with this effect were to take fatal damage, you die immediately. This effect lasts for 1 round. Considered a burn buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
